text: The banking system shall allow customers to transfer funds between their accounts.
The system shall require two-factor authentication for all transfers above 1000 EUR.
The system shall require two-factor authentication for all transfers above 5000 EUR.
The system shall send a confirmation SMS for each transaction.
The system shall not send SMS notifications to customers.
Customers shall view transaction history for the last 24 months.
Customers shall view transaction history for the last 6 months.
The system shall freeze an account after 3 failed login attempts.
The system shall use HTTPS for all customer interactions.
The mobile app shall be available for iOS and Android.
